Don't miss out on your perfect pair. Shop now: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/aot-uelHGQNI .

https://birkenstock.attn.tv/anEWyhB9b8st .
Birkenstock: You are already subscribed. Click here to shop now: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/cl/GjB.

leather: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/apObiq1G9Kir .

Birkenstock: Get a first look at new greens. Shop Green Tea, Pine Green and more: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/ajtU0TAm6bhq .

Taylor
Received black super birkis with vegan Sherpa lining ... I asked you if lining came out to be washed.  You checked and told me it did.  Cork foot bed does come out as they all do, but Sherpa lining is glued on to cork. Sherpa lining does not come out so I can wash it.  
I am not happy.

Birkenstock: I'm really sorry about what happened. It is not the experience that we want to have for our customers. I have already sent your concern to our team. Make sure to check your SMS for updates. I'll be in touch!

Birkenstock: Hey again! I just heard from the team. Please accept our apologies for any miscommunication concerning your Shearling Super Birkies.

The footbed is removable and replaceable, but the shearling is glued to the footbed, but you can still keep it clean.

To clean your shearling, we first recommend brushing the shearling with a suede brush or a clean toothbrush. This will help to remove any dirt and debris that may be trapped in the footbed. You can then use our Cleaner and Refresher Spray, available as part of our Deluxe Shoe Care Kit and lightly mist the footbed - https://birkenstock.attn.tv/ans7Gnfl1xFq

Alternatively, you can mist the footbed with a 50/50 mixture of water and white vinegar. Be careful not to over saturate as this can cause damage to the shearling or footbed. Lastly, please use a dry, clean cloth to wipe away any excess moisture and then allow the footwear to air-dry naturally, away from direct sunlight or concentrated heat, for at least 24 hours, or until completely dry.

That is not going to work for me.  
I expected to wash in warm water and soap as I do any other fleece.
Also "Sherpa" is pretty chintzy and not up to what I expect from Birkenstock.
I would like to just return them.

Birkenstock: I'm sorry to hear that. I understand that expectations for quality can vary, and it's important to get what you're hoping for.

You can return the items within 30 days of delivery, as long as they're in their original condition and packaging. Please note that Last Chance items are final sale and cannot be returned or exchanged. For more details, you can review our return policy here: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/aZIOaOJ_RKWH

You can start your return here: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/axVnVYGifHZJ
Are these last chance?
I hope not.

Birkenstock: I don't have access to your order details to check, but it is currently on final sale for $68.75. If you bought it for that price, I'm afraid it's a last chance and cannot be returned or exchanged. I apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for understanding.

$67.82 apparently 
I will no longer recommend Birkenstock to people.  
I've been buying Birkenstocks for over 50 years, but will think twice next time.

Birkenstock: I'm sorry to hear about your frustration, especially given your long history with Birkenstock. Since you were informed that the shearling is removable, I'll check with our team to see if there's anything else we can do to assist you. Could you please provide your order number so we can look into this further?

Order number
511595601
Maybe a compromise would be for you to send at no cost the normal footbed for the superbirkis?
I was just going to rip off fake shearling and hope for the best.
Thank you for trying
Birkenstock: Thank you for providing your order number. Can you also provide your full name and email address? I'll be happy to forward this to team for further evaluation. I'll be here!

marks.aardsma@gmail.com
Mary Jo Aardsma (I go by Jo Aardsma and I'm not sure which name I've used in ordering, probably both)
Birkenstock: Thank you for the information. I have already sent your concern to our team. Make sure to check your SMS for updates. I'll be in touch!
Thank you
Birkenstock: You're welcome, I'll keep you posted!

Birkenstock: Hi there, me again. Just got word from my team and unfortunately, we are not able to provide a complimentary Super-Birki footbed. We apologize for any inconvenience. If you have any further questions, please let me know.
I'm sorry to find out how little you value a customer of over 50 years.

Birkenstock: I'm really sorry to hear you feel that way. Your loyalty means a lot to us, and as much as we would love to give a complimentary footbed, we're currently not able to. Thank you for your understanding.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."
